mapper.select: select id, sender_role, receiver_role, channel, frequency, topic, created_at, updated_at from communication_matrix where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id}
select id, project_id, sender_role, receiver_role, channel, frequency, topic, created_at, updated_at from communication_matrix where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id}

select m.id, m.meeting_type, m.title, m.scheduled_at, m.duration_minutes, m.host_id, u.real_name as host_name, m.location, m.status, m.created_at, m.updated_at from meeting_plan m left join sys_user u on u.id = m.host_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} and m.id = #{id}
select id, project_id, meeting_type, title, scheduled_at, duration_minutes, host_id, location, status, created_at, updated_at from meeting_plan where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id}
mapper.update: update meeting_plan set meeting_type = #{meetingType}, title = #{title}, scheduled_at = #{scheduledAt}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, host_id = #{hostId}, location = #{location}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id}
mapper.select: select cr.id, cr.meeting_id, m.title as meeting_title, cr.record_type, cr.title, cr.content, cr.recorder_id, u.real_name as recorder_name, cr.created_at, cr.updated_at from communication_record cr left join meeting_plan m on m.id = cr.meeting_id left join sys_user u on u.id = cr.recorder_id where cr.project_id = #{projectId} and cr.id = #{id} and cr.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, meeting_id, record_type, title, content, recorder_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from communication_record where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
